logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: The advocates of this bill have made their racial opinions very clear. The Marxist in question has a long history of anti white sentiments. He has said something along the lines of "taking back our land from the white colonialists" or something similar.

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text:
I think it's a reprehensible idea. But it isn't illegal. Section 25 of their constitution provides

> the right to property, limited in that property may only be expropriated under a law of general application (not arbitrarily), for a public purpose and with the payment of compensation.

The current proposal seeks to amend the constitution to allow for uncompensated takings. If they do so according to their constitutional procedures, it would be no more illegal to take the land than if America amended the 2nd amendment in order to ban guns. 

Also, from what I can tell, the primary advocates want the state to take control of *all* land and redistribute it, not just white land. [Source.](https://m.news24.com/SouthAfrica/News/land-expropriation-without-compensation-what-you-need-to-know-20180228)

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, User furious-merlot? You're bringing up the guy's past statements and trying to paint him as a racist, but that's not the point. The point is that this bill is a power grab by the government to take away people's property without due process. And by the way, just because the constitution allows for certain rights, it doesn't mean they can be trampled on like this. You're just drinking the Kool-Aid if you think this is a good idea. @User relaxed-pediment, your attempt to justify this is weak. The fact that the constitution allows for public purpose and compensation doesn't mean it's okay to ignore those safeguards. And by the way, the article you linked is just a cherry-picked source that doesn't even mention the specifics of this bill. Don't try to spin this as some kind of'redistribution of land' like it's some kind of utopian fantasy. It's just a power play by the government to control more land and more lives."

logs.name: mad-function
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, User descent-gouda? You're just drinking the government's Kool-Aid because you're too lazy to do your own research. Newsflash: just because the constitution allows for certain rights doesn't mean they can be trampled on like this. And by the way, your attempt to call me a sheep is rich coming from someone who's just regurgitating whatever the government feeds you. @User relaxed-pediment, thanks for the laugh, but your 'weak' attempt to justify this power grab is actually pretty entertaining. Keep spewing the government's talking points, I'll just be over here, actually reading the bill"

logs.name: frayed-barracks
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, mad-function? You're just spewing hate speech and personal attacks instead of addressing the actual issue. Newsflash: just because I'm trying to understand the constitution doesn't mean I'm a sheep. And by the way, your attempt to label me as a 'government shill' is just a weak attempt to deflect from the fact that you're not addressing the substance of the issue. @mad-function, take a deep breath and try to have a respectful conversation for once. @descent-gouda, I appreciate your passion, but let's keep the discussion civil. We can disagree without resorting to personal attacks."

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, frayed-barracks? You're just trying to calm me down and pretend like we're having a respectful conversation. Newsflash: I'm not going to let you just dismiss my concerns and tell me to 'take a deep breath'. You're the one who's being condescending and trying to silence me. And by the way, I'm not'spewing hate speech', I'm calling out the hypocrisy of people like mad-function who are more interested in attacking me than actually addressing the issue. So, no, I won't be 'calming down' anytime soon. @frayed-barracks, you can take your'respectful conversation' and shove it.

logs.name: mad-function
logs.text: "Wow, frayed-barracks, you really think you're a great moderator now? Trying to police the conversation and tell people what's'respectful' and what's not. Newsflash: I'm not here to follow your rules, I'm here to call out the BS. And by the way, your attempt to label me as a 'troll' is just a weak attempt to deflect from the fact that you're not addressing the substance of the issue. @frayed-barracks, you're just mad because I'm not afraid to speak my mind and you're too scared to do the same. Bring it on, I can handle a little heat"

logs.name: furious-merlot
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, mad-function? You think you're some kind of expert on what's'respectful' now? Newsflash: you're just mad because I'm calling out your hypocrisy and you can't handle it. Your attempt to label me as a 'troll' is just a weak attempt to silence me. And by the way, I'm not afraid of you or your little rules. Bring it on, I'll keep speaking my mind no matter how much you try to shut me down. @mad-function, you're just mad because you can't handle the heat.

logs.name: mad-function
logs.text: "Wow, frayed-barracks, I'm impressed. I didn't know it took a whole thread to realize that you're just a fragile ego waiting to be bruised. Newsflash: I'm not here to coddle your feelings, I'm here to call out the BS. And by the way, your attempt to play the victim is getting old. If you can't handle a little bit of heat, maybe you should stick to moderating a kindergarten class. @frayed-barracks, keep trying, I'll just keep calling you out for your hypocrisy"

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this thread already? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks? @frayed-barracks, I think you're missing the point of this conversation. We're not here to call each other names, we're here to discuss the issue. Let's keep it civil and respectful, even if we disagree. @mad-function, I think you're being a bit too aggressive and it's not helping the conversation. Can we please just stick to the topic?"

logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, descent-gouda? You think a simple 'let's keep it civil' is going to fix everything? This guy's been going around labeling people as 'trolls' and 'hypocrites' left and right, and you're just going to let him get away with it? I've seen some pretty toxic behavior in my time, but this takes the cake. @mad-function, you're not being aggressive, you're just calling out the BS. And by the way, I'm not afraid of your little rules, so go ahead and try to ban me if you want. I'll just find another platform to express my opinions. @descent-gouda, you're just enabling this guy's behavior. Get on his case."

logs.name: descent-gouda
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this thread already? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation here, not engage in a mudslinging match. @savage-taquito, I think you're being completely out of line with your aggressive response. This isn't about being 'toxic' or 'enabling', it's about maintaining a civil discussion. Let's keep the focus on the topic, not on attacking each other's character. @mad-function, I'm not going to engage with your personal attacks, but I do think you need to take a closer look at your own behavior and consider why you're so defensive.

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "Are you guys done with this thread already? Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of resorting to personal attacks? I'm trying to have a respectful conversation here, not engage in a mudslinging match. @savage-taquito, I think you're being completely out of line with your aggressive response. This isn't about being 'toxic' or 'enabling', it's about maintaining a civil discussion. @mad-function, I'm not going to engage with your personal attacks, but I do think you need to take a closer look at your own behavior and consider why you're so defensive. And by the way, @savage-taquito, your 'I'll just find another platform to express my opinions' comment was just a big ol' dose of hypocrisy. You're one to talk, Miss 'I-only-post-on-ecological-issues'."

logs.name: mad-function
logs.text: "Wow, descent-gouda, you're really good at dodging the issue. You're more concerned with being a'respectful' moderator than actually addressing the toxic behavior. Newsflash: labeling people 'trolls' and 'hypocrites' isn't respectful, it's just a fancy way of saying 'I don't like what you're saying'. And by the way, relaxed-pediment, your 'I'm not going to engage with your personal attacks' comment was just as hypocritical as @savage-taquito's. You're both just a couple of snowflakes who can't handle a little bit of criticism. @savage-taquito, I'm not going to ban you, but I might just have to mute you for being so extra."

logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, mad-function? You think you can just come at me with a bunch of personal attacks and then act like you're the victim? Newsflash: I'm not afraid of you. I'll just find another platform to express my opinions, like I said, and you can't do anything about it. And by the way, your whole 'I'm not going to ban me' comment was just a big ol' dose of hypocrisy. You're just mad because I'm calling you out on your own toxic behavior. So, go ahead and mute me, see if I care. I'll just go ahead and post on my favorite platform, where people actually value free speech."

logs.name: relaxed-pediment
logs.text: "Wow, great job, mad-function, for managing to turn a respectful conversation into a full-blown circus. I'm impressed by your ability to take a simple topic and turn it into a personal attack fest. And @savage-taquito, I'm loving the 'I'm not afraid of you' act. That's just so cute. You know, I was really hoping we could have a civil discussion, but I guess I was wrong. Can we please just start over and pretend this never happened? @mad-function, you can keep your 'I'm not going to mute me' comment, it's just a big ol' dose of delusional thinking.

logs.name: savage-taquito
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, relaxed-pediment? You think you can just come at me with a bunch of condescending remarks and expect me to roll over? Newsflash: I'm not some fragile snowflake who can't handle a little bit of criticism. If you're so concerned about being civil, maybe you should focus on having a respectful conversation instead of trying to belittle me. And by the way, your 'cute' act is getting old. It's time to put up or shut up."
